task_description: Make the AI chat feature more interactive and conversational: send conversation history to Gemini for context continuity, improve system prompt for better action generation and interactive Q&A behavior, make localAIReply more dynamic, add new action types (koreksi, analisis, laporan), and enhance action confirmation UI with edit capability.

verification.summary: node --check passes for both keuangan-app.js and netlify/functions/gemini.js. Semantic review issues (XSS, balance validation, history markers, size cap, DOM duplication) all addressed in follow-up commit.
